commands_executed: findmnt --mtab --raw --evaluate | grep "^/\w" | grep -v "^/proc" | grep "\s/dev/\w" | awk '{print $2" "$7}' | while read -r line; do echo $line | awk '{print "$ " $2 }'; done | sed 's/defaults/nodev,defaults/g' >> /tmp/fstab_mod.txt

execution_details.stdout:
#
# /etc/fstab
# Created by anaconda on Mon Feb  9 07:40:38 2026
#
# Accessible filesystems, by reference, are maintained under '/dev/disk/'.
# See man pages fstab(5), findfs(8), mount(8) and/or blkid(8) for more info.
#
# After editing this file, run 'systemctl daemon-reload' to update systemd
# units generated from this file.
#
/dev/mapper/rlm-root    /                       xfs     defaults        0 0
UUID=8bbec118-7baf-40c6-910b-6a336e901242 /boot xfs     defaults        0 0,nodev,nodev,nodev
UUID=F56C-228D          /boot/efi               vfat    umask=0077,shortname=winnt 0 2,nodev,nodev
/dev/mapper/rlm-home    /home                   xfs     nodev        0 0
/dev/mapper/rlm-swap    none                    swap    defaults        0 0
tmpfs /dev/shm tmpfs nodev,nosuid,noexec 0 0
